title: Bikechess
overview: Dina works as a journalist for the national television station. The stories she is asked to report on are becoming increasingly absurd and full of praise for the government. Her love life is limited to a few secret meetings with her married camera­man. Dina looks after her young sis­ter, a lesbian activist, who regularly finds herself in trouble with the au­thorities.

trailers.title: Saltanat Nauruz Auditioning. Tribeca 2024 Bikechess 🏆 winner
What was that? The film 'Bikechess' (Veloshakh) won at the Tribeca Film Festival 2024. [Russian]
